label: Non-Duality
summary: Subject and object, self and universe, are not ultimately separate at the deepest level of realization.

comparisons.quote: Brahman alone is real; apparent separateness is misperception.
No independent essence can be found in any phenomenon.
Multiplicity appears within a deeper unity of being.
In letting-go, the ground of soul and God is discovered.
The divine no-thingness is beyond fixed conceptual grasp.
The nameless ground gives rise to ten thousand things.

sources.title: Wikipedia: Non-Duality
sources.note: Baseline seed reference; strengthen with primary sources for academic use.

label: Impermanence
summary: All conditioned phenomena change; attachment to permanence produces suffering and confusion.

comparisons.quote: Wisdom depends on right judgment amid changing circumstances.
Rigid identity yields to spontaneous change.

sources.title: Wikipedia: Impermanence
sources.note: Baseline seed reference; strengthen with primary sources for academic use.

label: Consciousness as Ground
summary: Ultimate reality is interpreted as luminous awareness rather than inert matter.

label: Ego Dissolution
summary: The rigid sense of separate self relaxes or dissolves in deep contemplative realization.

label: Love as the Path
summary: Love is treated as an active transformative discipline leading toward union with the absolute.

label: Emptiness / Sunyata
summary: Phenomena lack independent, fixed essence and arise interdependently.
